logged_in.description: A flag which indicates if the Scan is using authentication during the Scan

links_in_queue.description: The number of links in the crawling queue

links_crawled.description: The number of links already crawled

attacks_in_queue.description: The number of links in the attacking queue

attacked.description: The number of attacks already performed

requests.description: The number of HTTP requests which have been executed

failed_requests.description: The number of failed HTTP requests

drip_delay.description: The current delay between HTTP requests
